anchor: Sunday long-form — why small pest-control wins matter

posts.body_preview:
Pest control isn't sexy. Nobody tweets about it.

But we took one family-run pest control company from $36K/mo to $80K/mo in a quarter. One agent. Two automations. Here's how 👇
Sunday reflection — the unglamorous truth about running an AI services business in 2026. It's not about the models. It's about operating rigor. Here's my 12-item weekend checklist.
Sunday brunch catering: 120 covers, 3 staff, 0 stress. Agent handled intake, prep list, and delivery windows. The rest was knives and butter.
Behind-the-scenes story: screenshots of the pest-control SMS agent closing its 40th booking of the week. Nobody tweets about pest control. Everyone should.
Boring industries are the best PMF test for AI services. 60-second breakdown using a $36K → $80K pest-control case study.
